prompt: A cyberpunk neon poster-style illustration of a cute futuristic black cat mascot centered in a dark rainy high-tech city. The cat is a simple rounded silhouette with two tall ears, huge white circular eyes with tiny black pupils, a tiny worried mouth, and two hot-pink whisker marks on each cheek. Behind the cat is a glowing circular holographic halo made of layered magenta and cyan rings. The background is a dense futuristic cityscape filled with vertical light streaks, holographic glitches, data noise, reflections, and luminous signage in electric blue, purple, and pink. At the top center, large glowing text reads "未来猫" with smaller text below reading "FUTURE CAT". Include exactly 7 interface panels and HUD elements around the cat: 1 top-left badge reading "LEVEL 99", 1 upper-left panel reading "NEKO PROTOCOL" with smaller Japanese text below, 1 left-mid slanted panel with tiny unreadable techno glyphs, 1 left-lower panel reading "ERROR_404", 1 top-right warning panel reading "WARNING" with a triangular alert icon, 1 right-lower panel reading "NEKO UNIT-01", and 1 bottom-center status strip reading "> SYSTEM ONLINE <". Also add 2 small cat icons, one near the top-right corner and one embedded in the right-side UI area. Add faint small Japanese microtext near the lower right area. Style is glossy synthwave cyberpunk, anime-game UI fusion, poster composition, high contrast, moody nighttime atmosphere, heavy glow bloom, chromatic aberration, glitch texture, holographic reflections, wet neon ambiance, ultra-detailed background with the mascot remaining bold and graphic in the foreground. Square composition.
